name: Crock-o-Magic
recipeIngredient: Apple, wilted, bad spots removed, chopped
Dry rice or 1 cup cooked rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Gather all your leftovers that are about to be discarded and place them in the crockpot.
2. Add water until everything is covered.
3. Set the crockpot to low heat and cook for 12 hours.
This recipe, inspired by a Depression-era method, transforms unusable leftovers into a delicious meal. It's versatile and can be enhanced with leftover ribs or rib bones for added flavor. Serve it alongside smoked salmon salad on stone-ground wheat crackers and enjoy a glass of iced tea.
